title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
jsonLd.skills: Machine Learning, Java, Node.js, SQL, Agile/Scrum, Python, Microservices, React
